reason: Verify global architecture and Stage 2 boundaries after implementation.
Verify packed-i4 Gearbox/remediation contracts, fail-closed validation, and no performance-win drift.
Verify Common EmitC remains neutral and provider-owned facts stay authoritative.
Verify resource-aware selected-body realization/tuning claims are bounded and production-backed.

Verify the new task preserves the prior final regression/no-win policy outcome.

summary: Focused checks passed for the packed-i4 remediation contract slice. Build targets tcrv-opt, tcrv-translate, tianchenrv-rvv-extension-plugin-test, and tianchenrv-target-artifact-export-test rebuilt successfully. C++ RVV plugin and target artifact export tests passed. Python self-tests and dry-run generated-bundle ABI/same-target scripts passed with /usr/bin/llvm-readobj-20. Manual tcrv-opt/tcrv-translate export checks confirmed header metadata, and manual stale handoff/artifact negative checks failed closed with targeted diagnostics. git diff --check passed; git diff --cached --check remains the final pre-commit check.
ssh_rvv_measurement: No real ssh-rvv runtime/performance measurement claimed in this slice; Gate 3 remains open.
known_tool_limits: llvm-lit/FileCheck and clang-format were unavailable in PATH, so equivalent manual route/export checks were used and no clang-format run was claimed.

summary: Focused checks passed for the Gate 2b schedule-decision slice. Rebuilt tcrv-opt, tcrv-translate, tianchenrv-rvv-extension-plugin-test, and tianchenrv-target-artifact-export-test. Ran build/bin/tianchenrv-rvv-extension-plugin-test and build/bin/tianchenrv-target-artifact-export-test. Ran python3 -m py_compile for the touched dry-run scripts. Manual tcrv-opt/tcrv-translate pipeline verified realized schedule decision facts, handoff schedule decision facts, route metadata, target header mirrors, stale handoff rejection, and stale artifact-mirror rejection. Generated-bundle ABI dry-run and same-target measurement dry-run verified schedule decision fields without ssh execution. Added-line old-authority scan and git diff --check passed.
ssh_rvv_measurement: No real ssh-rvv runtime/performance measurement claimed in this slice; Gate 3 remains open for generated artifact correctness and real same-target measurement.
